description.ko: 에메랄드빛 막을 통해 생체 발광 영양분이 리듬감 있게 흐르는 유기체의 혈관계를 깊이 있게 묘사합니다.
description.en: A deep dive into the vascular system of an organic entity, showing the rhythmic flow of bioluminescent nutrients through emerald membranes.

prompt: An ultra-detailed cinematic 3D render of AURA-7, titled 'The Chlorophyll Pulse.' A macroscopic view inside a giant translucent leaf structure where #7FB069 emerald moss-membranes act as respiratory chambers. Inside, thick #2D5A3D forest-green vascular filaments pulse with #FFE66D golden bioluminescent sap that moves like heavy liquid mercury. The entire ecosystem is suspended in a #E6F2E1 pearlescent fluid with micro-bubbles of oxygen. Macro photography focus on the rhythmic expansion of semi-permeable cell walls and the golden fluid exchange. Rendered in Octane with hyper-realistic fluid dynamics, volumetric light shafts, and extreme soft focus bokeh. 8k resolution, serene organic life.
